name: manticorephp/compiler
description: Manticore — a PHP-to-native AOT compiler, written in PHP and self-hosted; compiles a large PHP 8.5 subset to standalone arm64/x86_64 binaries via LLVM.

scripts-descriptions.build: Build Manticore from source into $MANTICORE_HOME (default ~/.manticore) and install the `manticore` binary.
